/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/_truescaler_core.dir/link.d  -o _truescaler_core.cpython-314-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_truescaler_core.dir/src/core.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib: /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.13.0 /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.13.0 /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.13.0
